query:
-- Update existing plans with professional data
UPDATE plans SET
  is_recommended = 0,
  trial_days = 14,
  max_contracts = 20,
  max_api_calls = 0,
  feature_keys = JSON_ARRAY('properties','units','contracts','payments','maintenance','reports_basic','invoices','tenant_portal'),
  limits_json = JSON_OBJECT('max_properties', 5, 'max_units', 20, 'max_users', 2, 'max_contracts', 20, 'max_api_calls', 0)
WHERE plan_name = 'المبتدئ';

UPDATE plans SET
  is_recommended = 1,
  trial_days = 14,
  max_contracts = 100,
  max_api_calls = 1000,
  feature_keys = JSON_ARRAY('properties','units','contracts','payments','maintenance','reports_basic','reports_advanced','invoices','tenant_portal','owner_portal','smart_alerts','accounting_basic','vouchers','api_limited'),
  limits_json = JSON_OBJECT('max_properties', 25, 'max_units', 100, 'max_users', 5, 'max_contracts', 100, 'max_api_calls', 1000)
WHERE plan_name = 'الاحترافي';

UPDATE plans SET
  is_recommended = 0,
  trial_days = 14,
  max_contracts = 9999,
  max_api_calls = 999999,
  feature_keys = JSON_ARRAY('properties','units','contracts','payments','maintenance','reports_basic','reports_advanced','invoices','tenant_portal','owner_portal','smart_alerts','accounting_full','vouchers','api_full','analytics_advanced','white_label','staff_management','multi_branch'),
  limits_json = JSON_OBJECT('max_properties', 999, 'max_units', 9999, 'max_users', 20, 'max_contracts', 9999, 'max_api_calls', 999999)
WHERE plan_name = 'المؤسسي';

-- Insert subscription features for Starter plan (id=1)
INSERT IGNORE INTO subscription_features (plan_id_sf, feature_key, enabled_sf, limit_value, created_at_sf) VALUES
(1, 'properties', 1, 5, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'units', 1, 20, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'contracts', 1, 20, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'payments', 1, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'maintenance', 1, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'reports_basic', 1, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'invoices', 1, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'tenant_portal', 1, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'reports_advanced', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'owner_portal', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'smart_alerts', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'accounting_basic', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'accounting_full', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'vouchers', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'api_limited', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'api_full', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'analytics_advanced', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000),
(1, 'staff_management', 0, NULL, UNIX_TIMESTAMP()*1000);
